mapper.sql: FROM review r JOIN shop s ON s.id = r.shop_id JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id LEFT JOIN review_merchant_reply rr ON rr.review_id = r.id LEFT JOIN merchant_review_appeal a ON a.merchant_id = s.merchant_id AND a.review_id = r.id
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.shop_id, s.name AS shop_name, s.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, r.region, r.user_name, r.content, r.score_overall, r.score_taste, r.score_env, r.score_service, r.cost, r.currency, r.like_count, r.comment_count, r.audit_status, r.status, r.tags, rr.id AS reply_id, rr.content AS reply_content, rr.operator_id AS reply_operator_id, rr.created_at AS reply_created_at, rr.updated_at AS reply_updated_at, a.id AS appeal_id, a.status AS appeal_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.shop_id, s.name AS shop_name, s.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, r.region, r.user_name, r.content, r.score_overall, r.score_taste, r.score_env, r.score_service, r.cost, r.currency, r.like_count, r.comment_count, r.audit_status, r.status, r.tags, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r JOIN shop s ON s.id = r.shop_id JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id WHERE r.id = #{reviewId} AND s.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND r.region = #{region} AND s.region = #{region} AND r.audit_status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT rr.id, rr.review_id, rr.shop_id, rr.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, rr.operator_id, rr.content, rr.created_at, rr.updated_at FROM review_merchant_reply rr JOIN merchant m ON m.id = rr.merchant_id WHERE rr.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_merchant_reply(review_id, shop_id, merchant_id, operator_id, content) VALUES(#{reviewId}, #{shopId}, #{merchantId}, #{operatorId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id, operator_id, review_id, shop_id, region, base_review_updated_at, reason, evidence_urls, status, reject_reason, audit_by, submitted_at, audited_at, created_at, updated_at FROM merchant_review_appeal WHERE id = #{appealId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND region = #{region}

SELECT id, merchant_id, operator_id, review_id, shop_id, region, base_review_updated_at, reason, evidence_urls, status, reject_reason, audit_by, submitted_at, audited_at, created_at, updated_at FROM merchant_review_appeal WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND region = #{region} AND review_id = #{reviewId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, merchant_id, operator_id, review_id, shop_id, region, base_review_updated_at, reason, evidence_urls, status, reject_reason, audit_by, submitted_at, audited_at, created_at, updated_at FROM merchant_review_appeal WHERE id = #{appealId} AND region = #{region} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant_review_appeal( merchant_id, operator_id, review_id, shop_id, region, reason, evidence_urls, status ) VALUES( #{merchantId}, #{operatorId}, #{reviewId}, #{shopId}, #{region}, #{reason}, #{evidenceUrls}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_review_appeal SET status = 0, reject_reason = '', audit_by = 0, audited_at = NULL, operator_id = #{operatorId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{appealId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 3

UPDATE merchant_review_appeal SET operator_id = #{operatorId}, reason = #{reason}, evidence_urls = #{evidenceUrls}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{appealId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 0

UPDATE merchant_review_appeal SET operator_id = #{operatorId}, base_review_updated_at = #{baseReviewUpdatedAt}, status = 1, reject_reason = '', submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{appealId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 0
UPDATE merchant_review_appeal SET status = 2, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{appealId} AND region = #{region} AND status = 1

UPDATE merchant_review_appeal SET status = 3, reject_reason = #{reason}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{appealId} AND region = #{region} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM merchant_review_appeal WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status IN (0, 1, 3) ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_review_appeal SET status = 4, reject_reason = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status IN (0, 1, 3)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant_operation_log(merchant_id, operator_id, action, target_type, target_id, detail) VALUES(#{merchantId}, #{operatorId}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{detail})
